content: Curiosity-driven active learning agents with 2024-2025 SOTA scalable memory can be reframed as self-organizing ecological agents where unlabeled environmental data acts as a renewable resource, and memory pruning acts as natural selection to retain only high-value, uncertainty-reducing memories that boost long-term task performance. This framework redefines agent memory management not as a technical storage problem, but as an evolutionary adaptation to an unpredictable information landscape.
